tools.name: accounting.getAccounting
tools.description: Retrieves accounting activity during the queried timespan.

tools.name: auth.postOauthAccessToken
tools.description: By default tokens are valid for 7 days while refresh tokens are valid for 30 days. If your `grant_type` is "password" include the `username` and `password`, if however your `grant_type` is "refresh_token" the username/password are not required, instead set the `refresh_token`

tools.name: inventory.getInventory
tools.description: Retrieve inventory for one or more items. This API requires elevated permissions, please speak to your success manager.

tools.name: orders.deleteOrdersId
tools.description: Request an order is canceled to prevent shipment.

tools.name: orders.getOrder
tools.description: For the fastest results use the FDC provided `id` however you can use your `merchantOrderId` as the `id`.

tools.name: orders.postOrders
tools.description:
Error Notes:
* When `409 Conflict` is a 'Duplicate Order' the `context` will include the FDC `id`, see samples.

tools.name: partners.putOrdersIdShip
tools.description: Note, this API is used to update orders and is reserved for our shipping partners.

tools.name: partners.putOrdersIdStatus
tools.description: Note, this API is used to update orders and is reserved for our shipping partners.

tools.name: returns.getReturns
tools.description: Retrieves summary return activity during the queried timespan. Although return knowledge can be learned from `GET /orders/{id}` it can take an unknown amount of time for an order that is refused or undeliverable to return to an FDC facility. Instead we recommend regularly querying this API.

tools.name: returns.putReturns
tools.description: Inform FDC of an expected return.

tools.name: tracking.getTrack
tools.description: Get uniformed tracking events for any package, this response is carrier independent. Please note, an API Key is required for throttling purposes, please contact your success manager for details.

tools.name: users.getUsersMe
tools.description: Returns the user profile of the access token's owner. This could be useful if managing multiple accounts or confirming validity of a token.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
